full_text:
Liu Yan (Junlang) 劉焉 (君郎)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Yan (劉焉), styledJunlang (君郎), was born in Jingling county, Jiangxia commandery. Proposed the creation of Governors. Governed Yi and centralized power. Liu Yan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Liu Yan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
